rows.label: tev024901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Sullivan about NLA's food supply.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Sullivan if anything
is troubling her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Sullivan about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Sullivan about the plants in NLA.

rows.label: tev024901_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Sullivan about the plants in NLA.

rows.label: tev024901_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Sullivan about the plants in NLA.

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0001
rows.name:
The food supply that I've helped develop is
quite tasty, wouldn't you agree? ...Hmm? You
don't even know what I'm talking about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Were you not aware that NLA's food
supply is made out of Miran flora at
the integrated production plant?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0003
rows.name:
NLA has no fields or ranches, and yet
we have all the grain, sausage, and
ketchup we need to make a fine hot dog.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm confident that its taste and
texture closely mimic the real thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hmm? The nutritional value? I haven't
really thought about it. But as long as
it's not toxic, I'm sure it's fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0008
rows.name:
In order to study the plant life
of Mira, I've submitted requests
for BLADEs to collect samples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0009
rows.name:
You are a BLADE yourself, yes?
My, my, my! I'm quite tempted to
ask for your help as well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0010
rows.name:
But the problem is, I haven't yet
decided which area I want samples from.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Ah, what should I do? They
all seem so interesting...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0012
rows.name:
So we have our storage sample, test sample, display
sample, training sample, sponsor sample, gift sample,
award sample, propaganda sample, and personal one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Yes, this is quite fine. Thanks to the amount of
samples you were able to collect, we have spares at
the ready should our initial research projects fail.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0014
rows.name:
It would cost us the sample I had earmarked as
a contest prize, but these sorts of sacrifices
must be made for the advancement of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0019
rows.name:
All of the plants growing in NLA
are genuine, live plants that were
brought from Earth on the Whale.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0020
rows.name:
That's why we have caretakers
looking after them daily to
ensure they don't wither and die.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0021
rows.name:
The annuals are being tended
by Ivory, while Caroline minds
the evergreen trees. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0022
rows.name:
They are not mere gardeners, but greenskeepers
who guard our verdant heritage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0027
rows.name:
I've been meaning to ask, [ST:playername ]: Have you
found any sign of the Lifepoint section
that contained the botanical database?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0028
rows.name:
It is a database of all Earth's
flora, containing both genetic
information and seed samples.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0029
rows.name:
If we find it, we should be able to
revive plant species that we weren't
able to transport here from Earth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0030
rows.name:
My greenskeepers, Ivory and Caroline, have
shown little interest in cultivating the
Miran plants I've recommended to them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0031
rows.name:
They say they would prefer to raise
Earth flowers. I do hope you can
find the database for them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0036
rows.name:
I have received word from the Testament
Union that the Lifepoint segment with
the botanical database has been found.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0037
rows.name:
Apparently it landed in the
ocean and was severely damaged.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0038
rows.name:
The genetic samples are in disarray,
and most of the seeds have been swept
away by the ocean currents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0039
rows.name:
But a Ma-non I discussed it with seemed
to think it was possible to use the
data despite its waterlogged nature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0040
rows.name:
So with that hope, Ivory, Caroline,
and I have decided to begin a new
salvage and renewal project.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev024901_MSG0041
rows.name:
We will make this city into a Garden of
Eden for both Earth and Miran flora![ST:wait ]
